prompt:
A lot of students have the same problem. Somebody can solve it, somebody - not. Well, try to remember the main goal of students. It is easily. Students want to become a graduate: pass all exam and finish the university. Now I want to some tips for became diffiecult study easilier.
Tip number one. Try to rewrite solution from other students. I agree it is bad, but if you try to understand, what your friend write and understand the main idea of solution, you can solve the same problem in future.

Tip number two. Do sport. It is not obviously tip, but it really work. When you play, for exmaple, basketball or football your brain relax and do not do anything, so after training you can solve spend less time for doing homework than before traning.

Tip number three. More time of sleeping, more energy at work. It is obviously. If you sleep aproximately three hours, of course you do not have energy for working. If you sleep more than six hours, you wake up and understand that you can do everything.

Tip number four. Do homework after getting. It is obviously too. If you spend time now for preparing, you dont spend time in future for doing this, so you have more time for preparing for exams, so you have better mark than if you sleep in first iteration.

Well, It was four tips for making you eductation esalier

Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.

STUDENT_TEXT: i have a dog. he name is Bob. i very like play with him. table sky because run yesterday.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.
STUDENT_TEXT: A lot of students have the same problem. Somebody can solve it, somebody - not. Well, try to remember the main goal of students. It is easily. Students want to become a graduate: pass all exam and finish the university. Now I want to some tips for became diffiecult study easilier.

Tip number two. Do sport. It is not obviously tip, but it really work. When you play, for exmaple, basketball or football your brain relax and do not do anything, so after training you can solve spend less time for doing homework than before traning.

Tip number three. More time of sleeping, more energy at work. It is obviously. If you sleep aproximately three hours, of course you do not have energy for working. If you sleep more than six hours, you wake up and understand that you can do everything.

Tip number four. Do homework after getting. It is obviously too. If you spend time now for preparing, you dont spend time in future for doing this, so you have more time for preparing for exams, so you have better mark than if you sleep in first iteration.
